item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Looks like the replacement image wasn't localized, and the current link broke. I'll poke Elogee about this. Thanks for bringing it to attention!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The image appears to be dead.

item.title: Re: Licensing Junior Staff Post - Info
item.content:encoded:
The image that was used in this article has been replaced with the following image, which is cc-compliant with the SCP wiki's license (CC BY-SA 3.0):

Source: Needpix
License: CC0
Title: Mallard Males Water Bird
Author: Alexas_Fotos
Release year: N/A

item.title: Licensing Junior Staff Post - Info
item.content:encoded: The image used in this article has been sourced to http://stavangerphotobytanty.blogspot.com/2008/06/cute-duck.html which makes no mention of a compliant license. It has been removed.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: And why does it need an above-ground portion at all?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is beautifully weird. I wonder, did it start out as just the duck and the underground portion grew out of it, or did the underground portion come first and grow/assimilate the duck?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
That last interview log made me laugh more than most -Js. WHAT THE DUCK! +1

One thing, though: The first exploration log refers to the D-class as 'they,' then switches to 'him.' I suggest using male pronouns all the way through.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is probably the most surreal SCP I've seen in quite a while, and I've been archive binging the new pages for about a week now. The sac full of tongues in particular weirds me out. What the duck. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
im duck
gimme bread

Upvoted with vigor and passion.
Well, fuck a duck, this was pretty unsettling. Glad to have upvoted it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I've always thought of most D-Class as being picked up right before life gets a lot worse for them. Guy sold marijuana and was hit with the 3-strikes rule? Tell him he can go free by going D before his entire life is wasted in a prison cell. Lost your job/spouse and about to drop massively into poverty? We'll provide for your family. Refugees? Gold mine. Turkey's deal with the EU to limit the number of immigrants might well have also been a deal to hand Syrians over to the Foundation.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This manages to somehow be both really funny, disgusting and unsettling at the same time. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
At first I thought that a duck with an underground foot wouldn't be good. Then, I saw the first exploration log and that was suitably horrifying. Finally, that interview…lol wtd!

I have also heard that duck penises are pretty long. Perhaps you should use that instead?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I think since they clearly will take political prisoners and displaced persons, they'll take whomever they can get.

Most D-Class are probably political prisoners and displaced persons, since there are considerably more of those than there are prisoners awaiting execution, even in the PRC.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Huh. It makes you feel grateful for the laws in your country when you know that it could always be worse.

On another note, Sirpudding bringing up those totally fucked laws makes me wonder what the Foundation on a whole believes is worthy designating somebody as D-Class. Do you guys think they just get any death-row inmates, like that D-Class designation is based off of the local government, or might they have a way to designate who's worthy of D-ing based off of laws throughout the whole Foundation?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is thoroughly enjoyable. The interview at the end blends body horror and - what to call it, mind horror. There's *something* there that knows it exists, and that its existence is an abomination.

And then it dies. Good?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I would like to also point out that there are significant numbers of people sentenced to death for nonviolent crimes. In Saudi Arabia merely owning tarot cards is Witchcraft and Sorcery, a capital crime punished by beheading. In China you can be sentenced to death for smuggling, drug trafficking or fraud, and also for inchoate offenses, so you can be executed for merely planning fraud that you never committed. Singapore only recently stopped executions for drug possession. In the DPRK it is counter-revolutionary to have counter-revolutionary parents, so being born in the camps is a crime and they kill so many people in the camps through neglect that they might as well be under a death sentence.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is so well done. I love how you blur the lines between hilarious and downright horrifying. I up-voted before even reaching the exploration logs on the concept and execution alone. But then I got to that interview.

HOO BOY that interview is amazing in so many ways.

+1 duck

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
too often, I feel, we just have the D's that are just all "oh gosh this is so weird and scary and for some reason I'm reacting like a normal person even though the reason I'm here is because I'm a fucking phycopath who probably killed and raped a bunch of people"

Pop culture has a lot to answer for, in terms of the perceptions that:

  • all violent criminals are psychopaths / all psychopaths are violent criminals
  • psychopathy is constantly displayed, and instantly recognisable in almost any behaviour
  • psychopaths are badasses incapable of feeling fear

I also quite liked the D Class in this skip, and I think their respective laughter and fear were equally appropriate responses, dependent on the difference between seeing a human head quacking on a wall, and seeing your own head.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was really pleased with how this article managed to cross between being disgusting and having an odd, dry humor. The characterization of the two D-Class were entertaining as well; too often, I feel, we just have the D's that are just all "oh gosh this is so weird and scary and for some reason I'm reacting like a normal person even though the reason I'm here is because I'm a fucking phycopath who probably killed and raped a bunch of people(D-91883, basically)," and it was really satisfying to see someone react to a quacking human face coming out of the wall in a cave made out of duck organs by laughing. It also really added to the dark, yet humorous atmosphere.

Bravo!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is so bloody good. Take my goddamn upvote and leave me alone.

*me glances nervously at her plush ducks*

Don't you dare, motherduckers - OH GOD IT'S SPREADING.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like you.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: He's proper ducked.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was fucking creepy, especially the part when the D-Class tried pulling out the duck skeleton, only for the wall to open up and kill him in a gruesome display.

Did it really kill him tho, or is he duck? He's duck right? Fuck.

1+

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is your brain on quack.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
THIS IS NOT A DUCK THIS IS NOT A DUCK THIS IS NOT A DUCK

God, what a hook you have in that image caption. And then shit just gets weirder and weirder and weirder until, as that unfortunate D-Class said, it's fucked.

Pulsating membranes containing a large number of duck tongues

And this is just plain creepy. I mean, the head emerging from the wall beats it, but shit.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Wow, thanks!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I can't tell you how glad I am that you are back, you have written some of my most favorites! You are a cool dude!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Excellent combination of unsettling and absurd. I love that the head repeated stuff the D-Class said as he died. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: WHAT THE DUCK? +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
What the fuck?! What the fuck?! What the duck?! What the duck?! I'm duck.

Fuckin' love it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Pure awesome. Every time I think there's more than enough body-horror n the wiki, something special comes along and proves me wrong. Hits that sweet spot right between unsettling and hilarious, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Started writing this two years ago before I was banished from this plane. Finally, the duck is free!
